finding_results.notes: Removed narrator certification/exegesis at all three cited spans. (1) Line 141: Replaced 'that was what got him' and the sentence explaining that Sarah knows Dominic's apartment movement patterns with Nate's physical reaction (staying down longer than needed) and a concrete behavioral detail (she didn't check whether he was hurt), which conveys the same intimacy-gap without narrating why the line works. (2) Line 151: Cut the extended laugh analysis ('Not mean. More like the situation had confirmed something she already suspected about the limits of male initiative before seven in the morning.') so the laugh through her nose stands alone — her next line ('Dom, there's no basket in here') does the comedic and relational work without narrator explanation. (3) Line 211: Removed 'because the sentence was so specific to itself, so lightly annoyed' — the joke analysis that the finding explicitly flagged — so Nate's near-laugh exists as behavior without the narrator explaining why the line is funny. Also corrected 'What is' to 'What's' per Nate's high contraction level. (4) Line 219: Replaced 'That got the laugh out of him before he could screen it' (which certifies the joke's power) with 'He laughed before he meant to' (pure behavioral report). Trimmed 'It came out wrong at first because' to a dash join. Preserved the biometric-profile fear, which is Nate's paranoia about the impersonation, not narrator admiration. Contracted 'he had laughed' to 'he'd laughed' per Nate's high contraction interior register. Sarah's dialogue is unchanged in all four locations; only the surrounding narrator commentary was revised.

summary: Single finding (chapter_02_F001) addressed across four edit points in three spans. All instances of narrator certification, joke analysis, and reaction exegesis after Sarah's dialogue have been removed or replaced with Nate's concrete behavioral responses. Sarah's lines now play without narrator applause. Contraction fix applied to one Nate dialogue line ('What is' → 'What's'). No dialogue altered, no continuity changes, heading contract preserved.
